title: SEO marketing Executive
description:
We are looking for a talented and experienced digital marketing executive to join us! You will play a pivotal role in optimizing our websites strengthening our digital presence locally. This role requires you to implement effective, results-driven SEO, SEM and social media strategies to optimize our online visibility and outreach, establish strong and competitive web presence across search engines and paid channels, manage edm marketing, and achieve effective goal conversions.

Responsibilities:

  • Develop, execute, and optimize comprehensive SEO/ SEM strategies that align with the business and brand’s goals, ensuring improved website rankings and higher visibility in organic search results.
  • Conduct digital media forecast, planning, and execution for Google Ads and social media ads and bid management and budget optimization for maximum ROI.
  • Oversee the health of our digital assets and collaborate with developers to identify and fix any technical issues and ensure SEO best practices are properly implemented.
  • Manage lead generation and email marketing campaigns, which include optimize landing pages to drive conversions and improve the user experience.
  • Work with our designer in updating websites, price list and other marketing materials.
  • Updating of our social media pages.
  • Stay on top of the latest digital trends and algorithm updates to ensure our websites and social media activities remain compliant and competitive.

Requirements:

  • Experienced in similar SEO/SEM role with a strong track record of managing PPC budgets, improving rankings and driving paid search campaigns.
  • Proficient with hands-on implementation experience with SEO/ SEM consoles and third-party tools, such as GA4, Google Ads, SEMrush
  • Strong understanding of digital and performance marketing, programmatic advertising and display networks, and relevant data analytics.
  • Up-to-date knowledge of search engine algorithms and best practices in web and mobile SEO.
  • Skilled in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, wordpress backend for SEO purposes would be a bonus.
  • Ability to work independently and as a pro-active team member, have a data-driven mindset, with strong analytical and problem-solving skills.


Working Hours:
Monday - Friday (10am - 6pm)
39 woodlands close, MEGA@woodlands, Singapore 737856

postedCompany.description: Big Top is the leading carnival event planner in Singapore! We specialised in celebratory event planning for corporate events, family day, road shows, community events, and carnival theme parties. Our company also provides a one stop in-house carnival rental ranging from carnival games, bouncy castles, live food stations, arcade games, giant ball pit, lucky draw equipment, advertising balloons, launch mechanism and many more!
postedCompany.name: BIG TOP EVENTS PTE. LTD.
